invariants.canonical_wording: Request.workflowState contains milestones only; review, repair, confirmation, and reconciliation stay off the canonical workflow axis.
related_guards: LifecycleCoordinator is the only milestone derivation authority

invariants.canonical_wording: Blockers remain orthogonal to workflow milestones and episode lifecycle.

invariants.canonical_wording: patientRef is nullable until verified and is derived only from the latest settled IdentityBinding.

invariants.canonical_wording: Only LifecycleCoordinator derives canonical request milestone and closure changes.
related_guards: Child domains emit milestone evidence only

invariants.canonical_wording: Child domains may not directly write canonical Request.workflowState, Episode.state, or closure truth; they emit case-local truth plus milestone or blocker evidence.
related_guards: LineageCaseLink and DecisionEpoch remain the cross-domain join

invariants.canonical_wording: No business success state may be inferred from transport acceptance, local acknowledgement, or provider acceptance alone.
related_guards: Strong or policy-approved proof class remains mandatory before calm success

invariants.test_hint: Simulate accepted-for-processing, provider-accepted, or transport-accepted states and assert the UI stays pending or review-aware until authoritative proof lands.

invariants.canonical_wording: No post-submit mutation may remain writable after route-intent, session, binding, release, publication, or trust fences drift.

invariants.test_hint: Whenever the route tuple, publication tuple, or trust slice drifts, assert same-shell recovery or read-only posture rather than hidden mutation affordances.

invariants.canonical_wording: No closure may occur while coordinator-materialized blocker sets remain non-empty.
related_guards: Every blocking* ref set in RequestClosureRecord must be empty

invariants.test_hint: Assert close is impossible while any blocker ref list remains populated, including duplicate review, fallback review, identity repair, grants, reachability, and confirmation gates.

invariants.canonical_wording: Same-request continuation reuses the existing RequestLineage; same-episode or related-episode branching is explicit.
related_guards: same_request_attach requires an explicit continuity witness

invariants.test_hint: Retry, same-request attach, same-episode link, and related-episode branch must remain distinguishable from each other in persisted lineage history.

invariants.canonical_wording: Wrong-patient correction is a repair/hold path, not a workflow milestone or episode lifecycle value.
related_guards: IdentityRepairCase and downstream branch disposition remain mandatory before release

invariants.canonical_wording: Confirmation ambiguity remains explicit through gate and case-local objects; it does not collapse into generic success or generic error.
related_guards: Competing-gate ambiguity and hard-match failure keep review posture explicit

invariants.canonical_wording: More-info TTL, reminder cadence, supersession, late reply, and re-entry are explicit and fence-scoped.
related_guards: Exactly one checkpoint governs patient actionability at a time

invariants.test_hint: Late replies remain deliberate review posture; superseded or expired loops never silently reopen routine flow.

invariants.canonical_wording: Callback and clinician messaging require evidence-bound attempt or delivery truth plus a resolution gate before completion or closure.
related_guards: Outcome bundles and resolution gates remain mandatory

invariants.canonical_wording: Waitlist deadlines, callback fallback, hub transfer, and hub callback linkage remain explicit through durable fallback obligations and truth projections.

invariants.canonical_wording: Pharmacy consent, dispatch proof, weak-match review, urgent return, and bounce-back remain explicit and case-local until authoritative settlement.
related_guards: Current consent checkpoint and dispatch tuple remain current

invariants.canonical_wording: Assistive freeze, quarantine, downgrade, and rollout ceiling are explicit and remain in the same shell when live posture drifts.

invariants.canonical_wording: Retention, legal hold, recovery evidence admissibility, and resilience binding posture gate archive, delete, export, and live operator controls.
related_guards: Current graph completeness, hold scope, and resilience tuple remain mandatory

invariants.test_hint: Delete, export, restore, failover, and chaos controls must all fail closed when holds, graph dependencies, stale evidence packs, or tuple drift remain unresolved.

invariants.canonical_wording: Continuity evidence is promotion-critical and BAU sign-off cannot become exact without fresh continuity bundles in the same scorecard tuple.
related_guards: Current planning summary, runtime publication tuple, verification tuple, and continuity proof set must all still hash together
